title: Portuguese Malai Bites
description: A crispy, breaded twist on traditional Portuguese malai. Serve as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Cut the malai into bite-sized pieces.
In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, salt, and black pepper.
In another shallow dish, beat the egg.
Dredge the malai pieces in the flour mixture, then dip in the beaten egg, and finally coat in the breaded mixture.
Fry the coated malai pieces in the hot oil until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the fried malai from the oil and drain on paper towels.
Serve the Portuguese malai bites hot and enjoy!
